title: nasturtium fontanum
intro: Nasturtium fontanum, also known as watercress, is a fast-growing, aquatic plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. The health benefits of watercress include its ability to support eye health, boost the immune system, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Watercress can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a tea, a salve, or a supplement, and can also be consumed fresh in salads or as a garnish.
